para_trans: Martyr Rajguru Chowk, Madam Cama Road
Reference: - General Administration Department, Government Order No. Asp. 1225 / Q. No. 124 / Pr. 1, D. 10.10.2025
By order under reference, Shri Keshav Sadashiv Jadhav, Under Secretary, Department of Higher and Technical Education, Govt.
Devasthan Management Committee under the Department of Law & Justice, Western Maharashtra, Kolhapur.
The post of secretary in the office was held by a deputation.
2. Now, by this order, Shri Keshav Sadashiv Jadhav, Under Secretary, Department of Higher and Technical Education
Secretary for Administrative reasons, Devasthan Management Committee, Western Maharashtra, Kolhapur.
The order of appointment by the deputation is being cancelled.
The Government Order is available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
